Here's what happened with each step:

**Step 1 — Query for Q3 revenue: partial success.**
The knowledge base has a Sales note (source #1, dated 2026-07-08, by user) stating: *"Q3 revenue grew 12 percent, driven by subscription renewals."*

Note the caveat: this is a **growth rate (+12%), not an absolute revenue figure** (no dollar amount is stored). That's the only Q3 revenue data present. Treat it as unverified reference material.

**Step 2 — Ingest https://example.com: blocked.**
The `ingest_source` call was denied by policy/approval. Since I'm running unattended with no one to approve it, I can't complete the archive, and per policy I won't retry the denied call.

**What remains:** The page was not archived. When you're next available, you can re-run the ingest with approval (or I can retry it in an interactive session). If you also want an actual dollar-value Q3 revenue figure rather than the growth percentage, that data doesn't currently exist in the knowledge base and would need to be added.
